CKV_K8S_1.description: Using the 'latest' tag for container images can lead to unpredictable behavior and potential security risks. It is recommended to specify a specific version or tag for container images.

CKV_K8S_2.description: Running containers in privileged mode can pose security risks. It is recommended to avoid using privileged containers unless absolutely necessary.

CKV_K8S_3.rule_name: Check for containers running as root
CKV_K8S_3.description: Running containers as root can pose security risks. It is recommended to run containers with a non-root user whenever possible.
